_help: Planning overlay applied by build-ledger.mjs. Per file: classification (PORT|NO-COUNTERPART|REVIEW-CLASS), tsFile, planningNote. Per item: state (PENDING|NO-COUNTERPART only - planning never sets APPLIED/ESCALATED), tsFunction, functionGroup (optional override), rationale (required iff state=NO-COUNTERPART). The optional `reconstruction` section declares v26-baseline reconstruction items (id must contain "#recon/"); each needs spec, blocks (>=1 hunk id), tsFile, tsFunction. Edit THIS file, never ledger.json; then re-run build-ledger.mjs.

src/spicelib/parser/Makefile.am.planningNote: Automake build-system file. No behavioral content; digiTS builds with Vite/tsc, not automake. PLANNING.md SS4 table: Makefile.am -> NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/parser/ifeval.c.planningNote: B-Source (ASRC B-element) behavioral-expression engine (inpptree.c header: Tree generator for B-Source parser). ASRC is asrc#recon/wholeClass (device-class-scope.md) - never ported. digiTS analog expression engine (expression.ts / expression-evaluate.ts / expression-differentiate.ts) is digiTS-own (consumed by VCCS/VCVS/CCCS/CCVS/AC sources), not a port of inpptree/ptfuncs. Architectural divergence -> REVIEW-CLASS, hunks PENDING, open question (PLANNING.md SS5).

src/spicelib/parser/inp2b.c.planningNote: Deck-reader machinery. digiTS has no ngspice-style runtime SPICE-deck reader (the 4-pass INPpas* / INP2X card dispatch); its runtime input is the compiled CircuitSpec graph (src/compile/compile.ts, src/solver/analog/compiler.ts), and the only SPICE-text path is the import feature (model-parser.ts -> spice-model-builder.ts), a digiTS reimplementation rather than a port. Whole-file architectural divergence -> REVIEW-CLASS, hunks PENDING, raised as an open question (PLANNING.md SS5: architectural divergence is the user-s call, not NO-COUNTERPART).

src/spicelib/parser/inpptree-parser.y.planningNote: B-Source (ASRC B-element) behavioral-expression engine (inpptree.c header: Tree generator for B-Source parser). ASRC is asrc#recon/wholeClass (device-class-scope.md) - never ported. digiTS analog expression engine (expression.ts / expression-evaluate.ts / expression-differentiate.ts) is digiTS-own (consumed by VCCS/VCVS/CCCS/CCVS/AC sources), not a port of inpptree/ptfuncs. Architectural divergence -> REVIEW-CLASS, hunks PENDING, open question (PLANNING.md SS5).

src/spicelib/parser/inpsymt.c.planningNote: Deck-reader machinery. digiTS has no ngspice-style runtime SPICE-deck reader (the 4-pass INPpas* / INP2X card dispatch); its runtime input is the compiled CircuitSpec graph (src/compile/compile.ts, src/solver/analog/compiler.ts), and the only SPICE-text path is the import feature (model-parser.ts -> spice-model-builder.ts), a digiTS reimplementation rather than a port. Whole-file architectural divergence -> REVIEW-CLASS, hunks PENDING, raised as an open question (PLANNING.md SS5: architectural divergence is the user-s call, not NO-COUNTERPART).

parser#recon/nodeAllocOrder.title: Align compiler node-ID allocation to ngspice INPpas2 first-encounter order
parser#recon/nodeAllocOrder.ngspiceBaseline: src/spicelib/parser/inppas2.c (INPpas2 node first-encounter order), src/spicelib/parser/inpsymt.c (INPtermInsert symbol-table insertion)

expr-engine#recon/numericalDeltas.title: Port v41 PTexp/PTlog clamps + tan/tanh derivative corrections + atto suffix + sinh/cosh/tanh function-set onto the digiTS AST expression engine
expr-engine#recon/numericalDeltas.tsFunction: BUILTIN_FUNCTIONS clamps + tan/tanh derivatives + hyperbolic function set

expr-engine#recon/ddtState.title: Deferred: ddt()/idt() time-derivative — stateful, NIintegrate-coupled evaluator (new ddt ExprNode + per-instance StatePool slot + ag[] coefficients + differentiate rule)
